chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 502 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08-09-2022 Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for respondents / SSGC. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners. The petitioners, through instant petition, seek directions to respondents / ZIM’s Security (Pvt.) Limited, a private Company, to release the salaries of the petitioners. Comments have been filed on behalf of respondents No.1 to 3 (SSGC Limited), wherein it has categorically been asserted that the petitioners are not employees of Company. It appears that the petitioners earlier filed C. P. No. D-875 of 2012, which was dismissed by this Court vide judgment dated 17-10-2014, and thereafter, the petitioners preferred Civil Petition No.354-K of 2014, which was also dismissed by the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan vide order dated 23-05-2016; hence, this petition, being not maintainable in law, is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
